title: Dead Code, Unused Dependencies, and Reachability · Repository Template Mission
summary: A shared frontend platform team. The team needs a reproducible library repo with formatting, correctness linting, strict typing, domain literals, and dead-code controls. Planned artifact: Deliver Strict TypeScript Library Template with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.
Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.
Validate files, network data, environment variables, and user input at runtime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
